augmentations.rawDescription: Echoing Melody adds Recovery to Dawnsong on Rounds 2, 5, and 8.

abilities.name: Dawnsong
abilities.rawDescription:
Rounds 1, 4, and 7: Deal Physical Damage to 2 enemies within adjacency at a 70% Damage Rate.

Rounds 2, 5, and 8: Deal Fire Damage to 3 enemies in any lane at a 20% Damage Rate. This damage is increased by 1.5x if the target is afflicted with a Control effect, increasing the Damage Rate to 30%. Control effects include Stun, Stagger, Overwhelm, and Confusion.

At 6+ Stars:

Rounds 2, 5, and 8: Apply Recovery to 2 other Allies in any lane at a 60% Recovery Rate, enhanced by Intelligence.

notes: Mitigated by target Instinct.
Enemy adjacency remains unresolved.

condition.description: Per target, the target is afflicted with a verified Control status.
condition.subject: target

conditionalMultipliers.description: Per target, Control affliction increases Dawnsong Fire Damage by 1.5x.

notes: Mitigated by target Initiative.
Control category includes Stun, Stagger, Overwhelm, and Confusion only.

unresolvedQuestions: Recovery final formula and Level scaling.

abilities.name: Champion's Vigor
abilities.rawDescription: At Level 16+ and deployed in Vanguard: Rhysarion Recovery Dealt +15% and Initiative +25; Right Flank ally Damage Dealt +8%.

abilities.name: Ebbing Fury
abilities.rawDescription: Start of Round 1 for 3 rounds: reduce Damage Dealt of all enemies and all allies, including Rhysarion. Start of Round 4: apply Recovery to 3 Allies, including Rhysarion.

notes: This is a harmful friendly impairment, not support.

unresolvedQuestions: Progression prose says 27% at Level 1 while table says 27.5%; table value is stored.
Damage reduction stacking and refresh behavior.

abilities.name: Sharp Resolve
abilities.rawDescription: Start of combat until end of combat: increase Rhysarion Strength and Intelligence.

abilities.name: Echoing Melody
abilities.rawDescription: Command augmentation for Dawnsong: Rounds 2, 5, and 8 apply Recovery to 2 other Allies in any lane, excluding Rhysarion, enhanced by Intelligence.
unresolvedQuestions: Exact Intelligence enhancement and Dragon Level formula.

abilities.name: Unbroken Devotion
abilities.rawDescription: Start of combat: increase Recovery Received of 2 other Allies in any lane until end of combat, excluding Rhysarion.

glossaryEntries.definition: Reduces Damage Received. Magnitude and duration are supplied by the source ability.

abilities.name: Inspiring Melody
abilities.rawDescription: Each round: one activation chance. On success, select 1 other adjacent Ally and apply Initiative +20% enhanced by Rhysarion Intelligence plus Resistance Damage Received -15% for 3 rounds.

activationRoll.description: One shared activation and one shared selected adjacent ally receive both effects.

references.description: Resistance applies to the same ally selected for Initiative.

Rounds 2, 5, and 8: Deal Fire Damage to 3 enemies in any lane at a 20% Damage Rate. This damage is increased by 1.5x if the target is afflicted with a Control effect, increasing the Damage Rate to 30%. Control effects include Stun, Stagger, Overwhelm, and Confusion.
